channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-03-13 11:51 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok 4.20 Multi-Agent just took #1 on BridgeBench. 96.1 overall. 100% completion rate. 87.8s latency...
item.description: Grok 4.20 Multi-Agent just took #1 on BridgeBench. 96.1 overall. 100% completion rate. 87.8s latency. Beat GPT 5.4, Claude Sonnet 4.6, and Claude Opus 4.6. xAI came out of nowhere. The multi-agent future is here. And Grok is leading it.

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok Imagine offers a wider range of tools: image animation image editor video extension And now Up ...
item.description: Grok Imagine offers a wider range of tools: image animation image editor video extension And now Up to 5 image reference

item.title: @elonmusk: Many talented people over the past few years were declined an offer or even an interview@xAI. My apo...
item.description: Many talented people over the past few years were declined an offer or even an interview@xAI. My apologies.@BarisAkisand I are going through the company interview history and reaching back out to promising candidates.

item.title: @elonmusk: Try Grok, now with the ability to combine your images into one unique creative video or animation — ...
item.description: Try Grok, now with the ability to combine your images into one unique creative video or animation — absolutely fantastic and so easy to use!

item.title: @elonmusk: LEGO Version of Elon Musk Entering Twitter HQ in 2022
item.description: LEGO Version of Elon Musk Entering Twitter HQ in 2022

item.title: @elonmusk: AI is not soulless, grok btw
item.description: AI is not soulless, grok btw

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok Imagine is just really fun to use!
item.description: Grok Imagine is just really fun to use!

item.title: @elonmusk: Thanks for caring about a character I created when I was 24 and a book I wrote when I was 33. I'm ol...
item.description: Thanks for caring about a character I created when I was 24 and a book I wrote when I was 33. I'm old now, still trying to come up with truthful stories, and glad to know that you've taken Ender Wiggin to heart.@thomas_garrard*I’m also happy to see how many fellow humans have volunteered to replace Grok in a book discussion. **And speaking of being old, I first posted this incorrectly. Grok may have to replace me.

item.title: @elonmusk: There seems to be some confusion about X Premium+ and what perks it includes! To be clear: X Premium...
item.description: There seems to be some confusion about X Premium+ and what perks it includes! To be clear: X Premium+ *includes* SuperGrok. If you want to use the latest@Grokfeatures like Grok Imagine and Grok 4.20, it’s a better deal to get X Premium+ instead of just SuperGrok.

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok Imagines generates concert videos and original music
item.description: Grok Imagines generates concert videos and original music

item.title: @elonmusk: Thanks to@grokImagine’s new feature, you can use your own photo and a reference image you like to pu...
item.description: Thanks to@grokImagine’s new feature, you can use your own photo and a reference image you like to put on the armor. Prompt: Put this armor on Elon Musk, complete the missing parts of the armor appropriately, and create a beautiful video.
